channel.title: HEI — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on HEI (HEICO Corp) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED HEI (+15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added HEI in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Dev Kantesaria: ADDED HEI (+12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Dev Kantesaria (Valley Forge Capital) added HEI in Q4 2025 · 8.4% of portfolio. Building HEICO — aerospace aftermarket.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Dev Kantesaria)
